1.text: Pleural effusion extending to the right lung apex in the supine position

2.text: Atelectasis adjacent to the effusion in the lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Multiple parenchymal nodules with irregular borders in both lungs

4.text: Ground glass area with interlobular septal thickening in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

5.text: Widespread and randomized distribution of ground glass area with interlobular septal thickening in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe
